abilities.description: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card. CARDNAME gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is that card's mana value. Put the revealed cards on the bottom of your library in any order.

effect.description: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card. CARDNAME gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is that card's mana value. Put the revealed cards on the bottom of your library in any order.
effect.name: DigUntil
